emails.subject: Duke NDA
emails.body: Duke NDA Attached is our proposed form of NDA. Let me know if you have any questions or if I can be of further service.

emails.subject: Duke NDA
emails.body: Duke NDA Attached is our proposed form of NDA. Let me know if you have any questions or if I can be of further service.

emails.subject: Re: Duke NDA
emails.body: Re: Duke NDA Actually, can we amend it so that it is "unilateral" on the part of Enron (we agree not to disclose information they give us, but not the other way around)? EnronCredit is not providing Duke with any confidential information, our pricing information is very public and I don't want them worrying about them breaching a CA when they are using our pricing. Regards, Bruce From: Tana Jones@ECT on 10/26/2000 11:24 AM

emails.subject: Re: Duke NDA
emails.body: Attached is the one way (counterparty) only form you requuested. Bruce Harris@ENRON 10/26/2000 12:29 PM
